description: Prosodic mode honoring Quechua (Runasimi) oral tradition. Quechua — the language of the Inca and millions across the Andes — carries agricultural knowledge, cosmology, and communal memory through spoken word. Delivery is steady and even, reflecting the communal rhythm of ayni (reciprocity). No individual word dominates; the collective flow carries meaning. Emphasis falls at knowledge-bearing points where wisdom is transmitted.
intended_use: Preservation of Quechua (Runasimi) oral tradition prosodic patterns
Cultural voice interfaces honoring Andean Indigenous communication
Communal rhythm delivery reflecting reciprocity principles
